headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.gstatic.com https://apis.google.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firestore.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com https://libur.deno.dev; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://ui-avatars.com https://blogger.googleusercontent.com https://cdn.brandfetch.io https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
